top_signals.title: UPS upgrades service level for US-Mexico industrial shippers
top_signals.summary:
UPS says it has invested $50M in elevating service for freight shippers that use its parcel network between Mexico and the U.S. with the introduction of guaranteed day delivery and freight-specific pricing.

The post UPS upgrades service level for US-Mexico industrial shippers appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: De la Espriella supera a Cepeda en primera vuelta y redefine el mapa político colombiano
top_signals.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella dio la sorpresa en la primera vuelta presidencial de Colombia al obtener el 44% de los votos. El abogado conservador enfrentará al senador de izquierda Iván Cepeda en la segunda vuelta del 21 de junio. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes KB5089549 Windows security update install issues

top_signals.title: Damen Delivers Landing Utility Vessel to Blueshell Mussels
top_signals.summary: On April 20, Damen Shipyards Group signed a contract with Blueshell Mussels for the delivery of a Landing Utility Vessel (LUV) 2208. The vessel, named Bountiful, is supporting the company’s mussel harvesting operation in the Shetland Islands…
